scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/recall-bench && npm run build --workspace=bench-harnesses/recall && npm run build --workspace=bench-harnesses/mempalace
scripts.test: npm test --workspace=packages/core && npm test --workspace=packages/recall-bench && npm test --workspace=bench-harnesses/recall && npm test --workspace=bench-harnesses/mempalace
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/core && npm run lint --workspace=packages/recall-bench && npm run lint --workspace=bench-harnesses/recall && npm run lint --workspace=bench-harnesses/mempalace
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=packages/core && npm run clean --workspace=packages/recall-bench && npm run clean --workspace=bench-harnesses/recall && npm run clean --workspace=bench-harnesses/mempalace
